title: Repair vehicle aluminium body panels using filler
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Repair vehicle aluminium body panels using filler demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to repair aluminium body panels using filler

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Select and check body filler and materials for repair for quality and identify and interpret body filler safety data sheets (SDS)1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select and check aluminium repair tools and equipment for serviceability1.6 Plan work to identify aluminium repair methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Select and check body filler and materials for repair for quality and identify and interpret body filler safety data sheets (SDS)1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select and check aluminium repair tools and equipment for serviceability1.6 Plan work to identify aluminium repair methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret original equipment manufacturer (OEM) specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Select and check body filler and materials for repair for quality and identify and interpret body filler safety data sheets (SDS)1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select and check aluminium repair tools and equipment for serviceability1.6 Plan work to identify aluminium repair methods, minimise waste, and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to repair aluminium body panels using filler

elements.title: Carry out repairs using filler

pcs.text: Identify aluminium body panels to be repaired according to workplace instructions2.2 Repair panels to pre-filler condition following OEM or approved agency repair procedures, tools and equipment2.3 Mix filler according to manufacturer specifications2.4 Apply filler to repair panels using approved body filler instructions and equipment according to workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Complete filler repairs to pre-paint condition following safety and environmental requirements2.6 Check repairs according to workplace quality standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify aluminium body panels to be repaired according to workplace instructions2.2 Repair panels to pre-filler condition following OEM or approved agency repair procedures, tools and equipment2.3 Mix filler according to manufacturer specifications2.4 Apply filler to repair panels using approved body filler instructions and equipment according to workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Complete filler repairs to pre-paint condition following safety and environmental requirements2.6 Check repairs according to workplace quality standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify aluminium body panels to be repaired according to workplace instructions2.2 Repair panels to pre-filler condition following OEM or approved agency repair procedures, tools and equipment2.3 Mix filler according to manufacturer specifications2.4 Apply filler to repair panels using approved body filler instructions and equipment according to workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements2.5 Complete filler repairs to pre-paint condition following safety and environmental requirements2.6 Check repairs according to workplace quality standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out repairs using filler

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
